# [CL-01] All 10 DARPA CLARA gap blocks present as synthesisable RTL

> Plan ID `CL-01` — local plan identifier in this issue pack, **not** a
> GitHub issue number. See [`00_EPIC_2026.md`](00_EPIC_2026.md).

## Status

✅ **Done on γ-surface.** All 10 CLARA gap-block modules exist under
`src/` and are exercised by Verilog testbenches under `test/`.

## Evidence in this repo

- Authoritative map: [`CLARA_TRACEABILITY.md`](../../CLARA_TRACEABILITY.md)
- Modules: `src/redteam_filter.v`, `src/k3_alu.v`,
  `src/datalog_engine_mini.v`, `src/asp_solver_mini.v`,
  `src/sat_solver_mini.v`, `src/composition_kernel.v`,
  `src/restraint_ctrl.v`, `src/explainability_unit.v`,
  `src/proof_trace_writer.v`, `src/audit_log_ring_buffer.v`
- Testbenches: corresponding files under `test/` (e.g.
  `test/redteam_filter_tb.v`, `test/k3_alu_tb.v`,
  `test/restraint_ctrl_tb.v`, `test/tb_proof_trace_writer.v`).

## Acceptance criteria

- [x] Every CLARA gap (1..10) maps to ≥ 1 `src/*.v` module.
- [x] Every named RTL module has ≥ 1 testbench under `test/` or
      `sim/`.
- [x] R-SI-1 (`tools/check_no_star.sh src/`) passes.
- [ ] Formal proof per gap — tracked under [`04_CL-04.md`](04_CL-04.md).

## R5 honesty

"Gap covered by an RTL block" is not "gap formally proven". The
formal cross-walk is the responsibility of [`CL-04`](04_CL-04.md).
